message:
fix(export): handle stdout write errors instead of silently ignoring

- Report error to stderr and exit(1) if stdout write fails
- Add default_constructed_unit_structs lint allowance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -102,6 +102,8 @@ missing_fields_in_debug = "allow"
 too_long_first_doc_paragraph = "allow"
 # Unnecessary wraps acceptable for error handling consistency
 unnecessary_wraps = "allow"
+# Default unit struct construction acceptable
+default_constructed_unit_structs = "allow"
 # Pass by value acceptable for small types
 needless_pass_by_value = "allow"
 # Sort on primitives acceptable
